title: Eye Slack Thread — Live Streaming Structure & CCABot Slot Design
desc: Eye posts a single Slack thread as a live dashboard. All bots unified under 앱봇아이 username (no CWD suffix). Thread slot contract: root=status(앱봇아이), [0]=card placeholder(앱봇아이), [1]=앱봇아이 mouse+CCA analysis. Slot [0] ALWAYS force-created so 앱봇아이 CCA reply reliably lands at [1].
steps: [THREAD-CONTRACT] Fixed slot layout: root=앱봇아이 status (🟢 Eye alive PID/uptime/mem/frame). [0]=앱봇아이 card reply (IPC summary / active card content). [1]=CCABot mouse+CCA live analysis. Thread reused across restarts — never post new root if existing 앱봇아이 msg found (FindEyeStatusTsForReuse).

[SLOT-GUARANTEE] Reply [0] MUST always exist after new thread creation. If IPC summary empty at startup → post '_(loading...)_' placeholder (username=앱봇아이). Without this: CCABot occupies [0], index-based lookup fails, duplicate CCABot replies accumulate forever. Code: AppBotEyeGlobalMode.cs frameCount==0 block.

[CCA-REUSE] CCA reply reuse: search by username=='앱봇아이' via FirstOrDefault — NOT by index. Bug history: children[1] hardcoded → fails when card slot absent or thread has extra replies. _mouseCcaReplyTs holds ts; UpdateMouseCcaSlack() edits in-place via SlackUpdateMessageAsync(). New post only when ts==null.

[STARTUP-RECOVERY] Eye restart with existing thread: FindEyeStatusTsForReuse() finds root by username. SlackGetThreadRepliesAsync() recovers child ts values: filter username=앱봇아이 → children[0]=_eyeSummaryReplyTs. CCA ts recovered in UnifiedAnalysisLoop by username=앱봇아이 search. RestoreHoverReplyTs() applied when found.

[UPDATE-ONLY] All live content (card, CCA) uses chat.update (edit in-place) not new posts. Change-detection (_lastMouseCcaResult) skips Slack update when content unchanged. Purpose: conserve Slack message quota — free plan 90-day history cap.

[USERNAME-POLICY] All Slack posts from Eye use username=앱봇아이 (no CWD suffix — Eye is global, not per-folder). 클롣/코덳앱 bots keep CWD tag (e.g. 클롣[WG-WKAppBot]) since they are per-session. Ack messages in AppBotEyeSlackHandlers also use 앱봇아이 directly (not BuildSlackBotUsername).
author: claude
